content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (`LoginView.swift` SecureField/Sign in) with a subscription paywall, but `review_information/notes.txt` is just "n/a" — no steps to reach core blocking/schedule/report features behind the paywall.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need actionable notes to test gated features, especially a subscription paywall like `PaywallView.swift` ("App blocking, schedules, and reports require a subscription"). Your credentials look real (`demo_user.txt`, `demo_password.txt`), but the empty "n/a" notes leave the reviewer unable to know how to exercise the premium flow — consider explaining how to activate the subscription (sandbox tester or promo) and how to reach app blocking, schedules, and reports.
